Metadata.title: AI Game Video Editor | Seedance for Gaming Clips
Metadata.description: Turn raw gameplay into clip drafts with AI generation. Highlight detection and advanced editing automation are currently in development.

Hero.title: Edit gaming clips with AI, fast.
Hero.description: Import gameplay footage or prompts to generate clip drafts fast. Highlight recognition and auto-polish tools are rolling out in early access.
Hero.creditsHint: $1 one-time trial pack includes 1 rendered clip (once per account).
Hero.noModels: No enabled models are available for the current AI provider configuration.

Notifications.generationWillNotify: Generation may take a while. We'll notify you when it's ready.
Notifications.notificationDescription: Get notified when your video generation is complete.
Notifications.videoReadyBody:
Prompt: {prompt}
Your generation has finished. Tap to view.
Notifications.videoReadyBodyShort: Your generation has finished. Tap to view.

ToolPage.emptySubtitle: Start a generation on the left to see it here.
ToolPage.promptExample1: A cinematic close‑up of rain on neon streets, slow motion.
ToolPage.promptExample2: A cozy café at golden hour, gentle camera pan.
ToolPage.promptExample3: A futuristic skyline with soft fog and glowing lights.
ToolPage.tipsLine1: Be specific about subject, lighting, and motion.
ToolPage.tipsLine3: Add mood words: cinematic, dreamy, minimal.
ToolPage.generatingHint: This video is being generated. You can start another task meanwhile.

Showcase.title: Preview gaming highlight styles before you edit
Showcase.description: Reference cuts for streamers, UP creators, and clip channels.
Showcase.ctaText: Open more game-ready examples and adapt them to your footage.

stardew.title: Cozy day recap highlight
stardew.description: Turn long farm sessions into calm short-form recap drafts.

league.title: Teamfight clutch breakdown
league.description: Focus prompts on decisive fights and generate breakdown variants faster.

cs2.title: Round-winning frag montage
cs2.description: Build quick multi-kill cuts with prompt-driven pacing and timing.

Features.title: AI clip workflow built for gameplay footage
Features.description: Generate first cuts now, with highlight guidance and editing assists rolling out step by step.

quality.title: Highlight recognition (Coming soon)
quality.description: Automatic highlight detection is in development. Today, you can guide key moments with prompts and references.

workflow.title: AI edit assists (Early access)
workflow.description: Generation controls are currently available; subtitle, music, and effect automation is rolling out gradually.

delivery.title: Platform-ready outputs (Currently available)
delivery.description: Generate 16:9 and 9:16 clips for YouTube, TikTok, and Bilibili workflows, then publish with your own channel tools.

HowItWorks.title: From raw gameplay to highlight clip in three steps
HowItWorks.description: Plan, generate, and iterate in one workflow.

prompt.title: Describe your clip goal
prompt.description: Tell Seedance the game, mood, and moment type you want.

upload.title: Upload gameplay footage
upload.description: Add your recording or references, then pick aspect ratio and duration.

generate.title: Review drafts and download
generate.description: Check outputs, regenerate variations, and download clips. Direct publishing integrations are planned.

CTA.title: Build your next gaming highlight with Seedance
CTA.description: Start with one clip, iterate fast, and prepare versions for your creator channels.

benefits.free: $1 one-time trial pack (1 rendered clip, once per account)
benefits.support: Email support for creators and teams

panel.title: What you can do next
panel.headline: Generate, iterate, and manage in one workspace.
panel.description: Use the homepage generator for first cuts, then manage retries and downloads in My Creations.
panel.note: Tip: Save both 16:9 and 9:16 versions for different channels.

FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.subtitle: Key details about gaming clip workflows, usage rights, and credits.

general.question: Who is Seedance for?
general.answer: Seedance is for gaming creators, streamers, clip editors, and teams that need fast highlight production.

commercial.question: Can I publish generated clips on YouTube, TikTok, and Bilibili?
commercial.answer: Yes. Generated outputs can be used across creator and commercial channels based on your active plan terms.

aiModels.question: Which models and workflow features are currently available?
aiModels.answer: Current availability depends on your provider configuration. Generation is available now; highlight recognition, auto-edit enhancements, and direct publishing are in development.

credits.question: How do credits work?
credits.answer: Each generation and render consumes credits based on model and settings. Your monthly plan includes a credit allowance.

refund.question: Do monthly credits roll over automatically?
refund.answer: Monthly credits are allocated per billing cycle. Check plan terms for rollover or upgrade options.

support.question: Where can I get support?
support.answer: Contact support@videofly.app for billing, generation, or gaming workflow questions.

Footer.description: Seedance helps gaming creators turn raw footage and prompts into publish-ready clip drafts faster.

PricingFaq.faq_detail: Find answers to common questions about our pricing

Sidebar.title: Navigation

resetPassword.subject: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.title: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.body: We received a request to reset your password for your Seedance account.
resetPassword.instruction: Click the button below to reset your password:
resetPassword.validity: This link will expire in 30 minutes and can only be used once.
resetPassword.security: For security reasons, this link expires after 30 minutes.
resetPassword.ignore: If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.
resetPassword.footer: If you didn't request this, please ignore this email.

Testimonials.title: What gaming creators say after creating with Seedance
Testimonials.description: Feedback from stream clips, ranked highlights, and daily uploads.

streamer.name: Maya L.
streamer.quote: I can turn a three-hour stream idea into usable clip drafts in one short session.

editor.name: Connor T.
editor.quote: Prompt variants reduce timeline trial-and-error before we do final manual polish.

team.name: Nina P.
team.quote: One match VOD now gives us both 16:9 and 9:16 versions for different channels.

PricingLanding.title: Start with a $1 clip test, then scale your output
PricingLanding.description: No free tier. Choose the plan that matches your monthly clip volume.
PricingLanding.note: Trial includes 1 video and is limited to one purchase per account.

features.modelAccess: Access to Seedance generation models and workflow tools
features.flexible: Upgrade, downgrade, or pause as needed

trial.name: Trial
trial.description: One-time trial pack to test Seedance clip quality, speed, and style fit.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For solo creators publishing gaming clips on a regular cadence.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For channels preparing weekly clip versions across multiple platforms.

business.name: Business
